sagemaker.userprofile.rstudioserverproap: A collection of settings that configure user interaction with the `RStudioServerPro` app.

sagemaker.userprofile.rstudioserverproap.Description: Indicates whether the current user has access to the `RStudioServerPro` app.
The level of permissions that the user has within the `RStudioServerPro` app. This value defaults to `User`. The `Admin` value allows the user access to the RStudio Administrative Dashboard.
